subcodes.first_line: O maidservant of God! I received thy letter and read it with gratitude. Its contents were colorful and its meanings [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امه الله تحریرنزی آلدم اوقودم ممنون اولدم مضامینی رنگین ایدی و معانیسی
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
